subtitle: Start of week with key handovers and pending actions
context: James Salas Guillen returns from leave today after handing over H&S and DSE responsibilities. Multiple projects await attention including IM Principles URL changes, College Staff in PXD proposal, and GitHub dashboard workflow issues. Marie Cooksey is on annual leave this week (8-13 June).

urgent.title: IM Principles URL change - action needed by 23-24 June
urgent.sub: Laura Porter confirmed new URL will go live, old page comes down 23/24 June. Update links in PXD pages.
urgent.subject: RE: IM Principles - change to URL

urgent.title: H&S Handover from James Salas Guillen
urgent.sub: Review handover document for outstanding H&S items before James returns to work today.

needs.title: GitHub HRIS Dashboard workflow failures
needs.sub: Multiple failed runs (b97db4e, 5614c41, 30b1714, 3147735, 92e4d02). Investigate and fix root cause of Update HRIS Dashboard workflow.
